message:
fix: remove health indicator from FAB menu and add solid background (#3499)

- Remove DashboardHealthIndicator ("critical issues") from floating actions
- Wrap menu in solid bg-card container with border so buttons don't get
  lost against card backgrounds
- Simplify button styles since container provides the visual grounding

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
